title: Planning items as contacts on timeline

posts.author: TiredSteak (Russell Collins)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have view as a timeline (gantt? other?) to manage items as contacts (employees) per day. Employees are hired labour workers and I would like to plan/manage their availability (holidays) or assignment to specific company per specific date in the future. It’s important to see the items on the view on the left. How can I build such a solution in monday? Maybe with app? Is there something out of the box? So far we handled that with excel spreadsheet but it’s rough.

chrome_JFqJMrFJue1286×187 70.5 KB

Thank you for recommendations!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Russell,

Welcome to the community!

Based on your description, it sounds like our workload view might be best suited for you here, particularly if you’re looking to manage resources specific to timelines.

Had you looked into this feature?

  • The Workload view and widget

I’d love to hear if this format is something that could work for you?!
